issues.detail: The skill file only covers happy path examples and does not address error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: dropdown-with-outside-close
scenarios.rationale: Response A satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response B omits Alpine.js syntax and the required $dispatch event.

scenarios.name: reusable-todo-list
scenarios.rationale: Both responses meet the rubric, but B uses x-data='todoList' exactly as required, giving it a slight edge.
